Shalini Mam
21/2/2026
##1.Example for class and object class StudentData:     def show_info(self):         print("This is Student Data Analysis class") studentobj=StudentData() studentobj.show_info() ####2.Example  for init constructor class StudentDetail:     def _init_(self,mark):         self.marks=mark     def average(self):         return sum(self.marks)/len(self.marks) student1=StudentDetail([50,80,30]) print("Student1 Average mark is:",student1.average()) student2=StudentDetail([100,90,30]) print("Student2 Average mark is:",student2.average()) ##3.Example Encapsulation class StudentData:     def _init_(self,mark):         self._marks=mark#private data     def get_mark(self):         return self._marks     def set_mark(self,new_mark):          if new_mark >= 0:             self._marks = new_mark          else:             print("Invalid marks")     def average(self):         return self._marks / 5 student = StudentData(400) print("Marks:", student.get_mark()) print("Average:", student.average()) ## student.set_mark(450) print("Updated Marks:", student.get_mark())
